name: Fata Morgana
description: A desert/ocean MIRAGE — starfield night sky, a glowing horizon, and a reflective rippling neon floor — a faithful port of the Milkdrop/butterchurn builtin `martin [shadow harlequins shape code] - fata morgana` (custom feedback warp + procedural mirage comp) onto Phosphene's mv_warp, uplifted with stem separation: three neon spectra (drums/bass/vocals) sway over the water in time with the bars (phase-offset coordinated sway, anti-phase pair + weaving centre), each flaring its own brightness on its instrument's onset. Render loop replicated wholesale from butterchurn source (FA #70): warp(prev) → blur → shapes-on-top (=the feedback) → comp (display-only) → swap. Per-session glow-phase jitter (varied horizon hue on startup) and sRGB-correct comp output. See docs/presets/FATA_MORGANA_PLAN.md + D-139.
author: Matt
